name: Soft Tacos with Red Snapper
recipeIngredient: 2 Red onions, halved and Sliced thin
1 1/2 lb Red snapper, cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, heat 2 tablespoons oil over moderately high heat until hot.
2. Add onions, salt, and half teaspoon pepper, and sauté until rich golden in color.
3. Heat another skillet over moderately high heat until hot and add remaining 2 tablespoons oil.
4. Swirl and add snapper. Sauté for 2 minutes, turning frequently.
5. Add garlic, lime juice, and soy sauce, and sauté until the liquid is nearly evaporated and snapper is lightly golden in color.
6. Add oregano and remaining pepper, tossing to combine.
7. Add onion mixture and toss well.
8. Fill tortillas with lettuce and top with snapper and onion mixture.
